mapper.insert: insert into overseas_order( order_no, amount, currency, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, receiver_city, receiver_state, receiver_zip, receiver_country, status, paypal_order_id, paypal_capture_id, remark, pay_time, create_time, update_time ) values( #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverCity}, #{receiverState}, #{receiverZip}, #{receiverCountry}, #{status}, #{paypalOrderId}, #{paypalCaptureId}, #{remark}, #{payTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update overseas_order
status = #{status},
paypal_order_id = #{paypalOrderId},
paypal_capture_id = #{paypalCaptureId},
pay_time = #{payTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
amount = #{amount},
remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
